message:
fix: architecture-portable hash and improved change tracking diagnostics

replica.rs:
- Fix multiplicative hash to be portable across 32-bit and 64-bit architectures
- Cast sequence counter to u32 before multiplication to ensure consistent
  behavior regardless of usize width (was using usize which varies by arch)
- Add clippy allow annotation for intentional truncation

change_tracker.rs:
- Replace unwrap_or(Null) with explicit match blocks for serde operations
- Log warnings with tracing when snapshot deserialization or serialization fails
- Include model type name in warnings for easier debugging
- Changed behavior: failures now log diagnostics instead of silently defaulting

These changes improve debuggability in production by surfacing serialization
issues that were previously hidden, while maintaining the same fallback behavior
(treat all fields as changed when comparison fails).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
